recommendations.title: Face to Face
recommendations.overview: History Professor Brad Fletcher heads west for his health, but falls in with Solomon Bennett's outlaw gang. Fascinated by their way of life, Fletcher finally takes over the gang, leading with a new 'efficient' ruthlessness.

recommendations.title: For a Few Dollars More
recommendations.overview: Two bounty hunters both pursue the brutal and sadistic bandit, El Indio, who has a large bounty on his head.

recommendations.title: Hell on the Border
recommendations.overview: In the late 1800s, legendary marshal Bass Reeves sets out on the trail of notorious outlaw Bob Dozier.

recommendations.title: High Noon
recommendations.overview: Will Kane, the sheriff of a small town in New Mexico, learns a notorious outlaw he put in jail has been freed, and will be arriving on the noon train. Knowing the outlaw and his gang are coming to kill him, Kane is determined to stand his ground, so

recommendations.title: The Ridiculous 6
recommendations.overview: When his long-lost outlaw father returns, Tommy "White Knife" Stockburn goes on an adventure-filled journey across the Old West with his five brothers.

recommendations.title: Unforgiven
recommendations.overview: William Munny is a retired, once-ruthless killer turned gentle widower and hog farmer. To help support his two motherless children, he accepts one last bounty-hunter mission to find the men who brutalized a prostitute. Joined by his former partner an

recommendations.title: The Hateful Eight
recommendations.overview: Bounty hunters seek shelter from a raging blizzard and get caught up in a plot of betrayal and deception.

recommendations.title: Trigun: Badlands Rumble
recommendations.overview: In a quicksand surrounded town called Makka, rumors spread of a legendary robber named Gasback is after the town. To protect it, Mayor Kepler has hired bounty hunters. These hunters have been following Gasback from town to town in hopes of getting th

recommendations.title: Children of the Corn 666: Isaac's Return
recommendations.overview: A girl called Hannah goes back to her hometown (Gatlin) to find her mother but on the way she picks up a strange man who fore-shadows her life with a passage from the bible. When she gets there she wakes up Isaac from a coma he has been in for 19 yea

recommendations.title: The Tin Star
recommendations.overview: An experienced bounty hunter helps a young sheriff learn the meaning of his badge.
